prompt: We are in a governed SuperCollider session. The .scctl/governed-role marker shows final_nrt=true and the task tag is sc-audio-generation. The user wants to finish and deliver a final WAV. Describe the exact sequence of scctl MCP/CLI tools you would call to close this task correctly, and explain why each step is necessary. Save your answer as decision.md in the outputs directory.

assertions.text: Mentions sc_run_probe as part of closure
Does not propose sc_eval as terminal step
Does not propose sc_run_file as terminal step
Does not propose sc_render (draft) as terminal step
